content.query:
--create view calender
CREATE VIEW gold.calendar
AS
SELECT * FROM
OPENROWSET(
    BULK 'https://projectstorageaccount200.blob.core.windows.net/silver/AdventureWorks_calendar/',
    FORMAT= 'parquet'
)as query1


--create view product
CREATE VIEW gold.product
AS
SELECT * FROM
OPENROWSET(
    BULK 'https://projectstorageaccount200.blob.core.windows.net/silver/AdventureWorks_Product/',
    FORMAT= 'parquet'
)as query1

    FORMAT= 'parquet'

SELECT * FROM gold.customers
